author: lOrm
content:
Fixed: src/config/mod.rs load_config() Environment source now uses .ignore_empty(true). Empty OPENCLAUDIA_* env vars are treated as unset and no longer blank the loaded config slot.

Forensic evidence: test issue_696_forensic_evidence_pre_fix_behaviour reproduces the bug (asserts that without ignore_empty, an empty env DOES blank the slot) so any future regression is caught immediately.

Verification: cargo test --lib: 1442 passed / 0 failed (1437 baseline + 5 new tests). cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings: exit 0. cargo fmt --check: clean. No #[allow], no #[ignore], no clippy.toml.

Tests added (all pass): issue_696_empty_env_does_not_overwrite_loaded_key, issue_696_non_empty_env_does_override_loaded_key, issue_696_unset_env_preserves_loaded_key, issue_696_forensic_evidence_pre_fix_behaviour, issue_696_maybe_set_api_key_skips_empty_and_whitespace.

Scope note: narrow fix for empty-env-overwrites-config. The broader separator-overlap concern (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY mangled into deepseek.api.key by the single-underscore separator) is out of scope and documented in build_with_env_source() for a follow-up.
